ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the patient */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Brief medical history of the patient */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of diabetes */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption habits of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the record belongs to */,
  "num_preg" INTEGER /* Number of pregnancies */,
  "glucose_conc" REAL /* Glucose concentration in the patient's blood */,
  "diastolic_bp" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure */,
  "thickness" INTEGER /* Skin thickness */,
  "insulin" REAL /* Insulin level */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) */,
  "diab_pred" REAL /* Diabetes pedigree function */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "diabetes_orig" INTEGER /* Diabetes origin (1 for positive, 0 for negative) */,
  "skin" REAL /* Skin fold thickness */,
  "has_diabetes" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has diabetes */,
  "diabetes" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating the diabetes status (True for diabetes, False for no diabetes) */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the medical record was created */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who created the record */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the medical record */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the healthcare provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the healthcare provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare provider (e.g., clinic, hospital) */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the provider */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the provider was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients_providers" (
  "patient_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-provider relationship */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the patient started receiving care from the provider */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the patient stopped receiving care from the provider (if applicable) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the patient-provider relationship */,
  "next_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled visit */,
  "referral_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the referral (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_providers_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_providers_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diabetes_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the prediction is for */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_diabetes" INTEGER /* Predicted diabetes status (True for diabetes, False for no diabetes) */,
  "actual_diabetes" INTEGER /* Actual diabetes status (True for diabetes, False for no diabetes) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model used */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "predicted_on" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was last updated */,
  "predicted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diabetes_predictions_predicted_by FOREIGN KEY ("predicted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diabetes_predictions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health intervention */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the intervention is for */,
  "intervention_date" TEXT /* Date the intervention was recommended */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of health intervention (e.g., diet change, medication) */,
  "intervention_details" TEXT /* Details of the intervention */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the intervention (e.g., improved, no change) */,
  "recommended_by" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare professional who recommended the intervention */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up */,
  "patient_feedback" TEXT /* Patient's feedback on the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_interventions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_interventions_recommended_by FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for detailed access logs */,
  "logged_out" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES medical_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
